name: Add Custom Domain
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Adding a custom domain and logo allows you to brand your storefront and make it accessible through your own website URL. This helps establish trust with customers and ensures your store reflects your brand identity instead of a default system-generated domain."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This article explains how to "},{"text":"add a custom domain","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"verify it using DNS records","bold":true},{"text":", and "},{"text":"connect it to a sales channel","bold":true},{"text":" from the Back Office."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"To access, "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Go to "},{"text":"Back
